## Summary
<!-- What changes, and why. Keep it tight. -->

## Related issue
<!-- Closes #... or "n/a" -->

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / capability
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Template or fixture addition

## Checklist
- [ ] Typecheck passes (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] Added / updated tests for the behavior change
- [ ] No new `any`; no new implicit network calls
- [ ] If the compiler or exporters changed, a determinism test still passes
- [ ] Updated README / PRD if user-visible behavior changed

## Notes for reviewer
<!-- Anything worth pointing out: tradeoffs, follow-ups, things deliberately out of scope. -->
